title: Set up body alignment equipment on vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Set up body alignment equipment on vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to set up vehicle body alignment equipment

pcs.text: Task instructions are interpreted and vehicle to be worked on is identified1.2 Manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for aligning vehicle are sourced and interpreted1.3 Safety requirements are sourced and interpreted1.4 Potential hazards and risks associated with task are identified and reported to workplace supervisor
